audit_scores.reasoning: Strong audit with specific file references, technically sound findings across all dimensions, and well-calibrated importance scores that prioritize security and correctness appropriately for medical imaging.

findings.description: GLCM and GLRLM texture feature computation uses nested loops without vectorization, causing slow processing on large 3D volumes
findings.fix: Vectorize GLCM/GLRLM calculations using matrix operations and pre-allocate feature arrays

findings.description: Hosmer-Lemeshow test implementation may fail with small sample sizes or extreme probability bins
findings.fix: Add minimum sample size checks and bin merging logic for robust H-L test computation

findings.description: Large DICOM volumes loaded into memory simultaneously during parfor processing can exhaust RAM on systems with many workers
findings.fix: Implement memory-aware worker allocation and sequential processing fallback when available RAM is insufficient

findings.description: API rate limiting errors from Gemini/Claude are caught but may cause incomplete batch processing without proper retry logic
findings.fix: Implement exponential backoff retry mechanism for API rate limits with configurable max retries

findings.description: Shell escaping on Windows may be vulnerable to command injection with certain special characters in paths
findings.fix: Use more robust Windows shell escaping with comprehensive special character handling

findings.description: Function contains multiple distinct survival analysis tasks (Cox PH, competing risks, time-varying) in a single 500+ line function
findings.fix: Split into separate functions: fit_cox_ph_models.m, compute_competing_risks.m, analyze_time_varying_effects.m

findings.description: Registration quality metrics (Jacobian determinant, NCC, mutual information) lack unit tests for edge cases
findings.fix: Add test cases for singular Jacobian matrices, identical images, and mismatched dimensions

findings.description: Path handling for saved_files folder discovery may fail on Windows with mixed path separators
findings.fix: Use pathlib.Path.resolve() consistently and normalize all path separators before processing

findings.description: Variable names are inconsistent (feat_matrix vs features_matrix) and correlation threshold is hardcoded
findings.fix: Standardize variable naming and make correlation threshold configurable parameter

findings.description: Large MAT files are loaded entirely into memory even when only specific variables are needed
findings.fix: Use scipy.io.loadmat with variable_names parameter to load only required variables

audit_scores.reasoning: Excellent specificity with concrete file:function references and detailed technical fixes. Strong coverage across all dimensions including domain-critical areas like registration quality and survival analysis. Well-calibrated importance scores that appropriately weight security and correctness issues highest.

findings.description: GLCM computation uses nested loops with poor cache locality and redundant distance/angle calculations for each parameter map
findings.fix: Pre-compute GLCM offsets outside loops, use vectorized operations for distance calculations, and implement sliding window optimization for large 3D volumes

findings.description: Hosmer-Lemeshow test implementation does not handle edge case where expected counts in bins are zero, leading to division by zero in chi-square calculation
findings.fix: Add check for zero expected counts and either merge bins or use modified test statistic that handles sparse data appropriately

findings.description: Large DWI volumes are loaded entirely into memory for each patient in parfor loop without chunking, causing memory pressure with high b-value datasets
findings.fix: Implement volume chunking strategy that processes slices or blocks sequentially while maintaining parallel patient processing

findings.description: Registration failure cases are not handled - function assumes successful registration but does not validate transformation quality or detect registration failures
findings.fix: Add registration quality checks using Jacobian determinant bounds, mutual information thresholds, and fallback to rigid registration on DIR failure

findings.description: PH assumption test using Spearman correlation does not account for tied event times, which can bias the test statistic in datasets with discrete survival times
findings.fix: Implement tie-adjusted Spearman correlation or use alternative PH test methods like weighted residuals that handle ties appropriately

findings.description: BCa bootstrap implementation recomputes acceleration constant for each bootstrap iteration instead of computing once, leading to O(B²) complexity
findings.fix: Pre-compute acceleration constant using jackknife before bootstrap loop, reducing complexity to O(B) and significantly improving performance for large B

findings.description: Image data is base64 encoded and sent to external APIs without validation of image content or size limits, potentially exposing sensitive information
findings.fix: Add image content validation, implement size limits, strip EXIF metadata, and add option to anonymize/blur patient identifiers in images before API calls

findings.description: Time-varying coefficient implementation does not properly handle left truncation or late entry, which can bias hazard ratio estimates in observational studies
findings.fix: Add proper left truncation handling using entry times and implement robust variance estimation for time-varying effects with late entry

findings.description: Function contains 4 distinct analysis workflows (elastic net, LOOCV, diagnostics, feature assembly) in single 300+ line function, violating single responsibility principle
findings.fix: Already partially refactored into utils functions. Complete the refactoring by moving remaining inline code blocks to separate utility functions

findings.description: New registration quality metrics function lacks unit tests for Jacobian determinant bounds, NCC edge cases, and mutual information calculation
findings.fix: Add comprehensive unit tests covering boundary conditions, degenerate transformations, and validation against known registration scenarios

findings.description: scipy.io.loadmat loads entire MAT file into memory even when only specific variables are needed, wasteful for large metric files
findings.fix: Use h5py or scipy's variable_names parameter to selectively load only required variables, reducing memory usage for large MAT files

findings.description: Function uses hardcoded path separators in temporary file creation and does not handle Windows long path limitations for deep directory structures
findings.fix: Use fullfile() for all path construction and implement long path handling for Windows using \\?\ prefix when needed

findings.description: Net reclassification improvement calculation does not validate that risk thresholds are monotonically increasing, which can lead to invalid NRI values
findings.fix: Add validation that risk_thresholds array is sorted in ascending order and handle edge cases where thresholds are equal or improperly ordered

findings.description: Chart.js data generation does not handle NaN/Inf values in datasets, which can break JavaScript rendering and cause silent failures in browser
findings.fix: Add NaN/Inf filtering and replacement with null values in JSON serialization, with explicit handling in Chart.js configuration for missing data points

findings.description: All imputation methods are computed simultaneously and stored in memory before comparison, causing excessive memory usage for large longitudinal datasets
findings.fix: Implement streaming comparison that computes one imputation method at a time, compares metrics, and discards intermediate results

audit_scores.reasoning: Audit provides specific file:function citations with domain-appropriate statistical fixes (Schoenfeld residuals, Hosmer-Lemeshow test) and covers all relevant dimensions. Most importance scores are well-calibrated, though some performance issues could be rated slightly lower.

findings.description: GLCM and GLRLM computations are performed without vectorization, using nested loops that could be optimized with matrix operations
findings.fix: Vectorize GLCM and GLRLM calculations using matrix operations instead of nested loops, pre-allocate output arrays

findings.description: Schoenfeld residuals computation may produce incorrect results when there are tied event times, as standard Cox model assumptions break down
findings.fix: Add tied event time detection and use Efron approximation method for tied times in Cox regression

findings.description: Function does not validate that transformation matrices are invertible before applying deformable registration
findings.fix: Add matrix determinant check and condition number validation before applying transformations

findings.description: Function is 200+ lines with mixed responsibilities: API calls, image processing, CSV writing, and error handling
findings.fix: Split into separate functions: process_image_batch(), handle_api_response(), write_analysis_csv()

findings.description: Large DICOM volumes are loaded into memory without checking available RAM, potentially causing OOM on systems with limited memory
findings.fix: Add memory usage estimation based on image dimensions and available system memory before loading

findings.description: Switch statement with 11 cases has duplicated parameter validation code across multiple branches
findings.fix: Extract common parameter validation into helper function, use function handles for method dispatch

findings.description: No unit tests exist for registration quality metrics (Jacobian determinant, NCC, mutual information)
findings.fix: Add comprehensive test suite covering edge cases: identity transforms, large deformations, noise sensitivity

findings.description: Base64 encoding of images does not validate file size limits before processing, allowing potential DoS through large image uploads
findings.fix: Add file size validation (max 10MB) before base64 encoding, implement image dimension checks

findings.description: Windows shell escaping may fail with Unicode characters or paths containing non-ASCII characters
findings.fix: Add Unicode path handling and test with international characters, use system-specific encoding detection

findings.description: Distance matrix computation is O(n²) and not optimized for sparse missing data patterns
findings.fix: Implement sparse distance computation that skips calculations for features with no missing values

findings.description: Hosmer-Lemeshow test may produce incorrect p-values when expected frequencies are less than 5 in any bin
findings.fix: Add expected frequency validation and use exact test or combine bins when frequencies are too low

findings.description: JSON serialization failures are not caught when patient data contains NaN or Inf values
findings.fix: Add JSON encoder that handles NaN/Inf values and provides meaningful error messages for serialization failures

findings.description: Multiple large figure objects are created simultaneously without cleanup, potentially exhausting graphics memory
findings.fix: Implement figure cleanup after each visualization, limit concurrent figure objects, add memory monitoring

findings.description: Function contains hardcoded statistical significance thresholds and effect size interpretations
findings.fix: Move thresholds to configuration, create interpretive constants dictionary, make thresholds configurable

findings.description: No tests for stratified Cox models or extended Cox models with time-varying coefficients
findings.fix: Add unit tests covering stratification variables, time-dependent coefficients, and model convergence edge cases
